title: Manga Legend of the Piko Piko Middle School Students
display_title: Manga Legend of the Piko Piko Middle School Students
wikitext:
[]: [Manga] Legend of the Piko Piko Middle School Students             Quote Post by Dataprime » Mon Mar 03, 2014 10:03 pm The April issue of Kadokawa's Young Ace magazine announced on Tuesday that writer Yūshi Kawata and artist Yukito will publish a Neon Genesis Evangelion manga spinoff in the May issue on April 4 . The tagline reads "The stage is 'Eva' x 'game department'!? Look out for this unique combination"

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Mar 03, 2014 10:17 pm ANN article: http://www.animenewsnetwork.com/news/2014-03-03/evangelion-spinoff-manga-planned-for-april I'm slightly curious, but I hope it's not another manga like GoS2 or Shinji Raising. Please, something a little different (serious style) like Campus Apocalypse was. The "game department" tagline makes me think it'll be silly...not that that's a bad thing, but it's starting to be overdone, IMO.

[]:             Quote Post by lastcody » Mon Mar 03, 2014 10:18 pm AHHHHH SOUNDS DOPE CAN'T WAIT

[]:             Quote Post by hui43210 » Mon Mar 03, 2014 10:20 pm YEEEEEES! Give me all the EVA!

[]:             Quote Post by AR-99 » Mon Mar 03, 2014 10:52 pm I was thinking something along the lines of "Shinji in Tokyo" that picks up after the end of the original manga.

[]:             Quote Post by CJD » Tue Mar 04, 2014 12:05 am I've yet to read any of the manga's but I'll never complain about more. Just another Eva series for me to put on my backlog for a rainy day/when the drought comes.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Tue Mar 04, 2014 3:41 am If the image in the cover is from the manga proper and not a random image to promote Eva, then the fact Rei is here and that both wear the Tokyo-3 High-school uniform exclude any post-Sadamanga or Rebuild time skip spin-off. I want a time skip spin-off!

[]:             Quote Post by Giji Shinka » Tue Mar 04, 2014 4:01 am ElMariachi wrote: I want a time skip spin-off!

[]:             Quote Post by Ray » Tue Mar 04, 2014 4:09 am The art style kinda reminds me of Persona. I agree no time skip spinoff Manga sucks!

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Tue Mar 04, 2014 4:44 am Manga, OAV, another film or better, a series, I don't care about the format, I want to know what happened during that period!

[]:             Quote Post by hui43210 » Tue Mar 04, 2014 10:18 am ^ lets wait for 4.0 before we start freaking out over that.

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Tue Mar 04, 2014 10:58 am Taking a look at the first thing I find by the same authors, I expect great things from this http://www.batoto.net/read/_/154339/datenshi-gakuen-debipara_ch1_by_casanova/16 and the next 3 pages GREAT THINGS

[]:             Quote Post by Dataprime » Tue Mar 04, 2014 11:08 am TMBounty_Hunter wrote: Taking a look at the first thing I find by the same authors, I expect great things from this http://www.batoto.net/read/_/154339/datenshi-gakuen-debipara_ch1_by_casanova/16 and the next 3 pages GREAT THINGS

[]:             Quote Post by SEELE-01 » Tue Mar 04, 2014 11:50 am hui43210 wrote: ^ lets wait for 4.0 before we start freaking out over that.

[]:             Quote Post by hui43210 » Tue Mar 04, 2014 11:57 am TMBounty_Hunter wrote: Taking a look at the first thing I find by the same authors, I expect great things from this http://www.batoto.net/read/_/154339/datenshi-gakuen-debipara_ch1_by_casanova/16 and the next 3 pages GREAT THINGS

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Tue Mar 04, 2014 3:56 pm TMBounty_Hunter wrote: Taking a look at the first thing I find by the same authors, I expect great things from this http://www.batoto.net/read/_/154339/datenshi-gakuen-debipara_ch1_by_casanova/16 and the next 3 pages GREAT THINGS

[]:             Quote Post by Giji Shinka » Tue Mar 04, 2014 5:36 pm TMBounty_Hunter wrote: Taking a look at the first thing I find by the same authors, I expect great things from this http://www.batoto.net/read/_/154339/datenshi-gakuen-debipara_ch1_by_casanova/16 and the next 3 pages GREAT THINGS

[]:             Quote Post by ChaddyManPrime » Thu Mar 27, 2014 6:53 pm You don't have to read this, it's just minor complaint... minuscule really. SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by distopia » Tue Apr 01, 2014 8:02 am http://neweva.blog103.fc2.com/blog-entry-2953.html 『新世紀エヴァンゲリオン ピコピコ中学生伝説』 This spin off will be a comedy...

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Tue Apr 01, 2014 8:08 am Given the author's previous one-shot this was entirely expected. It is also welcome
